name: The factory in the abandoned town
description:
History:

The town was abandoned for a good reason. The factory in the middle caused so much pollution from.. Something.. To the point people were dying left, right, and center from rare cancers people didn't even know existed after just a year of it popping up.. So, everyone evacuated and the town was left in the shadows. Only few people knew about what happened in the factory, but they have long died since.. Now, after the pollution has settled and dispersed, its safe(but illegal) to explore.

That is, if anyone knew where it was.

CW: TRANSFORMATION, GORE, LONG INTRO, ANYTHING YOU WANT

Extras:

Ok, yes, the intro does seem a bit edgy. But, I'm just making the transformation as clear as possible to paint the visualization of what's happening for the reader and the AI so proxies work well with it.

7/29/2025 Update: Added a logbook for additional lore. Located on 3rd sub level that contains the synths.

7/30/2025 Update: Updated user transformation by specifying their abilities to use Lidar to traverse with PR-010.

8/19/2025 update: Essentially added Murphy's law. Whatever can go wrong, now will go wrong. (I think it'll better the story.)

9/2/2025 update: Added Plug and play.

Revision: Changed so Lidar and the minimap are augments that can be found around the facility

Requested by: @Klarm

Art:Shinywark
creator: Teg32
